subject: Natu, the Tiny Bird Pokemon — a small round green bird with red and white markings, stub wings, and large staring eyes, perched among flowering cacti or succulent plants
description: Natu perches among lush green cacti or succulent plants dotted with pink and purple flowers. The creature is small and round with a predominantly green body, red and white facial markings, tiny vestigial wings folded at its sides, and characteristically large, unblinking eyes staring directly forward. The setting is bright and plant-rich with a soft pink tone from the flowers. The overall composition is cozy and naturalistic, placing the small bird in an oversized leafy environment.
foreground: Natu — small round green bird with red and white markings and large staring eyes
background: lush cacti and succulent plants with pink and purple flowers
emotion: alert and watchful; large eyes and upright posture convey intense observation
